title: rosa sempervirens var. microphylla
intro: Rosa sempervirens var. microphylla, also known as the Dwarf Evergreen Rose, is a compact evergreen shrub that belongs to the rose family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rosa sempervirens var. microphylla include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help protect against chronic diseases and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat conditions such as anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues.
